frames.description: Street view of commercial buildings with closed shutters. A sign reads 'SREE RADHARAMAN KUNJ' in English and 'শ্রী রাধারমণ কুঞ্জ' in Bengali. A blue and white fence lines the sidewalk. One pedestrian is visible on the far left.

The camera moves right, showing 'NKG Diagnostics' (এন কেজি ডায়াগনস্টিকস) and 'ABANTI JEWELLERS'. A 'NEW INDIAN RESTAURANT (BOMBAY HOTEL)' sign is also visible. A pedestrian walks right, and a bicycle is parked. A red triangular traffic warning sign is seen.

View of a building housing 'Muthoot Finance' (মুথুট ফিনান্স). A smaller sign for 'শাওমি' (Xiaomi) is also present. A white car is parked on the bottom right. A person is sitting on the sidewalk behind the blue fence.
The camera captures a street corner. An 'IIFL Finance' sign is visible. A side lane stretches into the distance. A pedestrian walks left on the sidewalk.

Commercial buildings with several signs: 'HAZARI EYE CLINIC', 'Sandhyarag Saris' (সন্ধ্যারাগ শাড়ীজ). A green street sign indicates 'Jatindra Mohan Avenue' (যতীন্দ্র মোহন এভিনিউ). Direction boards point towards 'GIRISH PARK', 'ESPLANADE', etc. Several people are walking on the sidewalk.
Looking down a narrow street. Signs for 'The Raymond Shop' and 'AKANT SWEET' are visible. A few motorcycles are parked, and people are gathered.
Street view with older buildings and trees. A person on a motorcycle passes in the foreground (blurred). People are standing behind the blue and white fence near 'SHAN STORES'.
A street junction featuring a traffic light showing red. A large billboard with faces is prominent. Blue trash bins are on the sidewalk. Posters for 'BOYS PG' are stuck on walls.
Wide view of a city road. Green and yellow auto-rickshaws are either parked or moving. A billboard for 'The Self Culture Institute' is visible on the left.
Pedestrians stand near a building entrance on a street corner. Infrastructure includes a blue metal fence and streetlights.
Storefronts of 'CENTRAL MEDICAL STORES' and 'SREE RANISATI PAPER' (শ্রী রাণীসতী পেপার). People are walking and standing on the sidewalk.
A yellow Ambassador taxi passes by medical and paper shops. Signs for 'NARAYAN MEDICAL' and 'SREE RANISATI PAPER HOUSE' are visible.
Closer view of the shops. 'NARAYAN MEDICAL' chemist and 'শাওমি' (Xiaomi) sign. A cycle rickshaw is parked on the right.
A bus stop area on 'C.R. AVENUE'. People are waiting under the shelter. A blue 'BUS STOP' sign is visible.
A view of the bus shelter at 'BEADON STREET' featuring several bank advertisements. A man is sitting on the bench.
A blue and yellow public bus (WB-07J-0257) moves into the frame from the right. A small roadside temple is visible behind the fence on the left.
The bus is passing, partially obscuring shops like 'O MY GOD' and 'Habibsha Style Salon'. A police 'GO SLOW' barrier is on the sidewalk.
The bus has moved further, revealing more of the shops. People are sitting on the sidewalk. The 'GO SLOW' sign is clearly visible.
The camera captures more people on the sidewalk, including a woman in a blue sari. The background remains the 'O MY GOD' shop area.
A man on a bicycle and several pedestrians pass through the frame. The scene is still in front of the same commercial building.
A white mini-truck with 'AP HIRE' written on the side enters the frame. It carries bags of goods.
The mini-truck moves across the frame. An Indian flag is painted on its side panel. Pedestrians continue walking in the background.
The mini-truck is now central in the frame, partially obscuring the shops. The driver is visible.
Continued motion of the mini-truck. Background shops like 'O MY GOD' and 'Habibsha Style Salon' are still visible.
The mini-truck moves further left. A pedestrian is seen walking in the background behind the truck.
Truck continues moving. Minor shifts in pedestrians' positions on the sidewalk.
Similar to previous frame, the truck is moving towards the left edge of the image.
The truck is almost past the central viewpoint. Background pedestrians remain visible.
Another shot of the truck and the background shops. The scene remains consistent with slight camera or vehicle movement.
Final frame showing the truck passing by. Shops and people in the background are still visible.
